title: Enchantment Table Decoration
description: Expands the list of blocks which can be placed around an enchanting table without blocking bookshelf power
body:
This basic mod gives players more freedom to decorate their enchanting setup however they like.

The following blocks no longer block the enchanting table from recieving power from nearby bookshelves:
- Amethyst buds (any size)
- Banners
- Candles
- Carpets (wool and moss)
- Chains
- Coral Plants and coral fans
- Flowers & potted plants
- Lanterns
- Pressure plates
- Signs (regular and hanging)
- Torches
- Trapdoors

Additionally, chiseled bookshelves can be used in place of regular bookshelves to add some extra variety.
